title: Conduct an entomology research project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct an entomology research project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research insects

pcs.text: Investigate anatomical, morphological and taxonomic features of insects required for identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate anatomical, morphological and taxonomic features of insects required for identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate anatomical, morphological and taxonomic features of insects required for identification.

pcs.text: Examine the interaction of insects with trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine the interaction of insects with trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine the interaction of insects with trees.

pcs.text: Research annualised population and generational behaviour of insects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research annualised population and generational behaviour of insects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research annualised population and generational behaviour of insects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research insects

elements.title: Construct professional resource collections

pcs.text: Develop and document a reference collection of insects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a reference collection of insects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a reference collection of insects.

pcs.text: Create a database of tree pests and vectors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create a database of tree pests and vectors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create a database of tree pests and vectors.

pcs.text: Compile and document host, climatic and geographic distribution data of insects affecting trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile and document host, climatic and geographic distribution data of insects affecting trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile and document host, climatic and geographic distribution data of insects affecting trees.

pcs.text: Record and compile generational phenology of insects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and compile generational phenology of insects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and compile generational phenology of insects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Construct professional resource collections

elements.title: Research and assess tree pest and vector interactions

pcs.text: Investigate and identify natural antagonists, predators and parasitoids of insects affecting trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and identify natural antagonists, predators and parasitoids of insects affecting trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and identify natural antagonists, predators and parasitoids of insects affecting trees.

pcs.text: Investigate phytophagous and damaging insect–tree dynamics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate phytophagous and damaging insect–tree dynamics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate phytophagous and damaging insect–tree dynamics.

pcs.text: Investigate the tree dynamics of symbiotic/beneficial and insects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate the tree dynamics of symbiotic/beneficial and insects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate the tree dynamics of symbiotic/beneficial and insects.

pcs.text: Investigate physiological responses of tree resistance to insects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate physiological responses of tree resistance to insects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate physiological responses of tree resistance to insects.

pcs.text: Investigate host–pathogen and pathogen–vector interactions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate host–pathogen and pathogen–vector interactions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate host–pathogen and pathogen–vector interactions.

pcs.text: Evaluate conditions for selection of host trees by subcortical feeding insects and factors associated with attack
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate conditions for selection of host trees by subcortical feeding insects and factors associated with attack?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate conditions for selection of host trees by subcortical feeding insects and factors associated with attack.

pcs.text: Investigate and assess insect transmission of disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and assess insect transmission of disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and assess insect transmission of disease.

pcs.text: Evaluate multi-trophic interactions between host plant, pest and pathogen/parasitoids
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate multi-trophic interactions between host plant, pest and pathogen/parasitoids?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate multi-trophic interactions between host plant, pest and pathogen/parasitoids.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Research and assess tree pest and vector interactions

elements.title: Evaluate control systems

pcs.text: Determine economic costs of insect damage to trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine economic costs of insect damage to trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine economic costs of insect damage to trees.

pcs.text: Evaluate insects as indicators of environmental health and condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate insects as indicators of environmental health and condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate insects as indicators of environmental health and condition.

pcs.text: Determine insect biological hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine insect biological hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine insect biological hazards.

pcs.text: Investigate impact and effects of control strategies on target and non-target organisms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate impact and effects of control strategies on target and non-target organisms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate impact and effects of control strategies on target and non-target organisms.

pcs.text: Investigate insect resistance to pesticides
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate insect resistance to pesticides?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate insect resistance to pesticides.

pcs.text: Investigate and evaluate biological agents for tree pest control
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and evaluate biological agents for tree pest control?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and evaluate biological agents for tree pest control.

pcs.text: Investigate and evaluate tree health management options to manage insect infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and evaluate tree health management options to manage insect infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and evaluate tree health management options to manage insect infestation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Evaluate control systems

elements.title: Present results of research

pcs.text: Collect, tabulate, and analyse data from investigations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, tabulate, and analyse data from investigations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, tabulate, and analyse data from investigations.

pcs.text: Determine relevance of results to arboriculture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine relevance of results to arboriculture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine relevance of results to arboriculture.

pcs.text: Compile and communicate research and results into a research paper
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile and communicate research and results into a research paper?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile and communicate research and results into a research paper.

pcs.text: Submit research paper for review according to standards of a professional technical peer-reviewed journal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit research paper for review according to standards of a professional technical peer-reviewed journal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit research paper for review according to standards of a professional technical peer-reviewed journal.

pcs.text: Review feedback and amend according to reviewer comments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review feedback and amend according to reviewer comments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review feedback and amend according to reviewer comments.

pcs.text: Prepare article or presentation to communicate key facts and conclusions to industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare article or presentation to communicate key facts and conclusions to industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare article or presentation to communicate key facts and conclusions to industry.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Present results of research
